query: Could you assist in creating a 7-day travel plan starting from March 16th to March 22nd, 2022, for a group of 8 departing from Nashville and heading to Pennsylvania, planning to visit 3 cities? Our budget is set at $32,300. We would like to sample American and Chinese cuisines during our trip.
